name: temp-mail-workspace
description: Root launcher for Temp Mail frontend and backend

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && yarn --cwd frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "yarn --cwd frontend start"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend start" "yarn --cwd frontend start"
